final_prompt.prompt:
Create a Weibo news/hot-topic banner image for a social media post (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a documentary photography aesthetic with professional news-photo impact — references in the spirit of Magnum Photos street tradition, contemporary Chinese urban documentary photography, 2010s smartphone street photography movement; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be wide 16:9 horizontal format with ample negative space for text overlay, panoramic cityscape framing
Subject: must include city skyline at dusk, neon lights beginning to glow, pedestrians in motion, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset light
Scene/backdrop: must include urban dusk skyline with dramatic light contrast and authentic on-location feel
Lighting/mood: needs a dusk atmosphere with dramatic chiaroscuro lighting — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs sunset-to-neon transition tones — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs high-fidelity surface treatment with sharp detail and 8K-quality texture — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large headline, bold or modern typeface, prominent placement), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (subhead), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark, bottom or bottom-right)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 16:9 aspect ratio, ample negative space for text overlay, authentic on-location documentary feel
Avoid: must avoid over-processed/filtered look, must avoid cluttered composition that conflicts with text placement
